scores.correctness_notes: Core answer matches gold standard: temp_model fixture, deploy, wait with all_active and all_agents_idle, key facts about successes=3, error=jubilant.any_error all correct.
scores.hallucination_notes: juju.wait_timeout attribute not confirmed in gold standard; juju.debug_log(limit=1000) not mentioned in gold standard; status.apps['my-charm'].is_active and unit.juju_status.current attribute paths may not exist exactly as shown; these are minor unverified details beyond what gold standard confirms.
